# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI collaboration logo, followed by a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. A speaker explains the importance of high-quality data for good voice synthesis, mentioning a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and generate natural voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of data centers and server farms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video transitions to scenic aerial views from the Flight Simulator, showcasing detailed landscapes, mountains, castles, and a biplane flying over picturesque terrain. This segment visually demonstrates the immersive and realistic environment of the Flight Simulator.

# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus shifts to another speaker discussing the high fidelity of cognitive services' voice offerings, emphasizing how they sound more like actual human voices. The visuals show an indoor office setting with the speaker talking, followed by airport ground operations footage including an Airbus airplane being marshaled and prepared for pushback, illustrating real-world aviation scenarios.

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying over it, accompanied by the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data. The narration explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include sound waveforms and shots of data centers and server farms, highlighting the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model. The segment concludes with a simulated air traffic control communication between Orlando ground and an aircraft, showcasing the high fidelity and human-like quality of the cognitive services' voice output.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.
